sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72517" key="oi)noma/xlh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνο-μάχλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72517.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lustful with wine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
